title: Intensely Spicy British Tofu Ploughmans
description: A plant-based twist on the classic British ploughman's lunch, featuring spicy tofu and aerated umami flavors, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 180 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the cubed tofu with hot chilli powder and cook in the sous-vide machine for 2 hours
Toast the whole wheat bread slices until lightly browned
Assemble the ploughman's lunch by placing a slice of toasted bread on a plate, topping with a piece of spicy tofu, a spoonful of pickled onions, and a sprinkle of cheddar cheese alternative
Drizzle the balsamic vinegar and olive oil over the top of each ploughman's lunch
Serve the ploughman's lunch with a side of mixed greens and a sprinkle of salt and pepper to taste
Garnish with additional pickled onions and cheddar cheese alternative if desired
Repeat the assembly process for the remaining ingredients
